## edu-cli chapter list

List chapters (requires --syllabus-id)

```
edu-cli chapter list [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for list
      --page int           Page number (default 1)
      --page-size int      Page size (default 20)
      --parent-id uint     Filter by parent chapter ID
      --syllabus-id uint   Syllabus ID (required)
```
